horoscope:
The following are monthly horoscopes for Aries, typically available on the last day of the previous month. What are the dates/months for Aries?You have an Aries Sun sign if you were born from approximately March 21st to April 20th. However, the start and end dates vary from year to year, so if you were born around the start or end date of a sign, be sure to check your sign here:What is my Sun Sign? – Calculatorfor a definitive answer.

The month ahead is powerful for special attention to your personal life, dear Aries. There may be some important renovations and improvements in your home or within your family relationships. July holds a strong domestic theme for you. You tend to pour more heart into your home life, living conditions, nesting, or loved ones this month. Your instincts are strong in these areas!

Still, some backtracking over old problems and conversations is likely, and perhaps some paperwork to manage, with Mercury retrograde until the 23rd. Even if old problems re-emerge and blow up now, they’re likely to blow over later this month. Some delays can be blessings in disguise, as they give you the chance to redo, refine, or reconsider things. Ideas that emerge from your conversations and musings can be significant, prompting long-term plans. You may be trying to make sense of family matters and past patterns, and you’re set to learn much that can help inform your decisions.

July brings a strong focus on connecting, learning, transportation, communications, and daily affairs for you, dear Taurus. You’re also likely to enjoy your home and personal life more fully this month. While there can be ups and downs and delays to manage, you’ll ultimately get to see which of your projects are genuinely viable and worth your effort.

Your taste for experiences outside of the ordinary is notable as you begin the month, but while you’d do well to explore them, July can find you rather frequently dealing with your mundane affairs. It’s possible that siblings, relatives, or neighbors play a more vital role in your life. There is also a growing theme of extra attention to your home or family life, with fantastic opportunities to bring more harmony, comfort, enjoyment, and beauty to your personal or domestic world.

The month has wonderful potential for settling in and enjoying yourself, dear Gemini, but also for building something important to you. You’re more interested in security and long-term endeavors than you are in the excitement of the moment in July. In effect, you have more patience to draw upon, and it’s powerful. You’re often drawn to the right resources or connections you need, but the path is not always straightforward with Mercury retrograde until the 23rd.

Even with some delays or obstacles, it’s a fine time for making refinements and improvements. Efforts put forth now can lead to wonderful new beginnings and rewards. There are things to learn about your attachments, but there's also much to enjoy, especially on social and mental levels. Your mind is active, and your interests are exciting. Connections and communications can be delightful at times, even with Mercury retrograde until the 23rd.

You might realize the need for a fresh start or new approach with money, income, valuables, self-esteem, or comfort matters after the New Moon on the 14th. You may consider taking a new path, and after a period of reorientation, you will ultimately feel more in control. Consider that Mercury is retrograde until the 23rd in the same sector where this New Moon occurs, and it makes sense to look to the past for ideas before pushing ahead with brand-new plans!

Relationships are in strong focus as the month begins, dear Cancer, but the major themes of July are about you, your resources, confidence, work, and independence. A Full Moon at the end of June occurred in your partnership sector, and feelings have reached a head. You’re discovering who and what you need, and this self-awareness motivates you to get your act together. Your business acumen is attractive and appealing this month. Money is in good favor as well.

July is a powerful month for personal presence, but it’s also a month when you’re slowly coming into your own–it’s not an instant process! This is largely due to Mars spending all month in the sign just behind yours. You have some digesting and processing to do. While you’re visible and in the spotlight, some plans, motivations, and drives are in limbo or not quite ready. Mercury's retrograde in your sign until the 23rd is another reason to go slowly this month. While you’re mentally engaged and want to express yourself, there can be some delays and information clogs—perhaps even misunderstandings—until the 23rd.

There's a focus on personality and growth in July. The month is strong for small but significant changes as well as financial boosts. You’re learning a lot about yourself now. The New Moon on the 14th, which occurs in your sign, signals a time of personal new beginnings and a chance to reinvent yourself.

July features themes of personal appeal, leisure, friendship, healing, and replenishing your energy for you, dear Leo. As the month begins, the Full Moon has just occurred in your work and health sector and is a call to action regarding your work, services, habits, and health. Even so, there is a strong focus on downtime this month with the Sun (until the 22nd) and Mercury (all month) in your soul sector. It's important to take the time to rest, be still, reflect, and process recent events.

Your happiness goals, sense of community, feeling of belonging, and need to share and contribute are all in strong focus in July, dear Virgo. You’re also connecting with your more worldly ambitions and, later, your need for personal time away from the daily grind. It’s a powerful month for improving your social life while also attending to your responsibilities.

But with your ruler, Mercury, retrograde until the 23rd, it’s a good idea to take things easy in a general sense, mainly related to decision-making, health, and friendship or networking matters. It may be best to reserve judgment on some issues until you have all the information you need. You also have Venus in your privacy sector until the 9th, and you're keeping your affections close to your chest.

There is a continued focus on life direction, reputation, status, or career for you in July, dear Libra. However, there are growing themes of recreation, personal enjoyment, and friendship. It’s a powerful time for setting or adjusting goals and plans, but not necessarily for locking things down, given Mercury’s retrograde until the 23rd and a need to process, learn, understand, and adjust before pushing ahead.

But even if the month can sometimes feel slow-moving, Mars in your spirit sector all month ensures you’re also paying attention to your need for adventure, mental refreshment, discovery, and spontaneity. Venus in your social sector until the 9th is also friendly. You’re likely to feel appreciated and enjoyed this month! People are drawn to your optimism and generosity of spirit. You’re in particularly good shape for networking, sharing, and promoting.

You may need to return to an old project or redo and refine something that you thought was complete as Mercury retrogrades until the 23rd. If something’s left hanging, aim to focus on productivity in other areas. Consider that apparent backtracking can strengthen what was once on shaky ground.

The month ahead brings a special emphasis on learning, sharing, life experiences, and career or reputation, dear Scorpio. Your spirit to discover, explore, and share is in the spotlight, but you're also in particularly good shape in public or professional settings this month.

You begin July having just experienced a Full Moon in your solar third house, which awakened you to the need to connect, learn, and share. It can be a busy time, and this pace continues throughout the month in one form or another. However, you also have your eye on non-routine activities and learning, so you have a full plate now. This all needs managing so you can enjoy the month more wholeheartedly, since the demands on you are sometimes high.

Venus is at the top of your solar chart until the 9th, and you’re in a lovely light on professional and public levels. Venus helps with the tension and pressure of everyday work, effort, health routines, and the daily grind. You may very well gain some appreciation for the behind-the-scenes efforts you put in that aren’t always noticed.

Sagittarius datesare approximately from November 22 to December 21. However, it’s important to note that all Sun sign dates are approximate since they change from year to year. In other words, they’re dependent on your birth year, and in some cases, birth time. An emphasis on shared resources, debts, support, and self-empowerment continues in July, dear Sagittarius. You’re also exploring new ideas and especially enjoying learning and sharing. Publishing, promoting, traveling, or connecting are themes. You’re spirited and ready for something a little different as Jupiter, your planetary ruler, connects with most outer planets.

Still, there are some slowdowns to manage. You can feel in limbo in the first three-plus weeks of July regarding a financial matter or a connection as Mercury retrogrades until the 23rd. Waiting for an answer never feels great, but you have plenty to keep you busy while you wait. You’re returning to old problems with a different attitude, and taking care of unfinished business.

A rather relationship-focused month is in store for you, dear Capricorn. You begin the month especially aware of your emotional needs, however, with the Full Moon in your sign having just awakened you to your true feelings on a matter. With this new awareness, making some plans or adjustments that improve your life can be an important theme. However, it’s a little slow going with Mercury retrograde until July 23rd. People in your life may be having more dramas than usual, and you’re often drawn right in! While you’re in limbo on some issues, however, you can certainly enjoy yourself.

The month certainly brings a special focus on your one-on-one relationships and puts the spotlight on achieving a better balance or sense of harmony in your life in general. At the same time, July holds strong energy for getting your daily affairs in order or improving your personal routines and health or wellness pursuits with Mars in your solar sixth house all month.

Work, health, wellness, and personal routines are a strong focus for you in July, dear Aquarius. While there can be some backtracking or delays in these areas due to Mercury's retrograde until the 23rd, you’re also connecting with your need for more order or attention to your daily affairs. Rearranging your life in important ways to accommodate these needs can be in the spotlight.

But while your everyday affairs are often strongly on your mind, you also have some interesting social developments happening in July that keep things lively. For one, Mars spends all month in your sector of joy and creativity, and you’re pursuing your joy! For another, your partnership sector is strong and growing in relevance as the month advances. As such, it's a strong month for personal enjoyment, special interests, love, and partnering.

July brings a powerful focus on exploring your needs for expressing and enjoying yourself, dear Pisces. It’s an important month for arriving at a better understanding of your social or romantic connections, special projects, and personal objectives. But even with this exploratory, playful theme this month, you also have interesting developments with work, health, routines, daily life, and home. There’s a growing theme of everyday life and wellness pursuits.

The New Moon on the 14th begins clearing a path for a new start in a romance or with a creative project, and possibly even a new creative field or direction. Trust your intuition, showcase your work, share your ideas, and connect with people you want to spend time with. However, don’t be in a rush to lock things down since Mercury is retrograde until the 23rd.

With the Sun and Mercury in your sector of pleasure, recreation, hobbies, and love, you're in the mood to enjoy yourself, but there can also be some complications or backtracking related to these matters while Mercury is retrograde until the 23rd. Your attention often turns to the past. To clear the way for a fresh start, you may need to take care of some unfinished business. Projects might be on hold until you finish up some important details. Try not to spend too much time waiting for something to happen since retrograde Mercury periods are notorious for delays and obstacles. Instead, pour your energies into what you know will bear fruit while keeping things open in the ambiguous areas of your life.
